key.name: panel-box
key.description: Which panel box to place the indicator in: 'left', 'center', or 'right'.

key.name: panel-position
key.summary: Position index in the panel box
key.description: Index position within the chosen panel box (0 = start). Defaults to 1 so the indicator sits after the Activities button, keeping the 0×0 hot corner clickable.

key.name: rename-shortcut
key.description: Accelerator that opens the single-line editor to rename the current workspace.

key.name: rename-shortcut-enabled
key.description: When true, the rename-current-workspace keybinding is registered.

key.name: edit-all-shortcut
key.description: Accelerator that opens the multiline editor for all workspace names.

key.name: edit-all-shortcut-enabled
key.description: When true, the edit-all-workspace-names keybinding is registered.
